description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The front facade features a prominent entryway with a double door, flanked by windows and a small balcony above. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious backyard with a green lawn, patio area, and a covered outdoor seating space. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to the outdoor living areas. The exterior is finished in light beige and white tones, with minimal decorative elements for a sleek, contemporary look. A garage is integrated into the front, and a small rooftop structure is visible, likely for utilities or access.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious backyard patio. The exterior is finished in light beige and white, with a prominent entryway and integrated garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, double doors, balcony, and integrated garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, minimal windows, and a glimpse of the backyard with a pool and gazebo.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large backyard, patio, green lawn, and covered outdoor seating area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rooftop structure, side windows, and more of the backyard landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Double door entry with a small balcony above, minimal steps, and a simple overhang.
